title: PvZ Minecraft
description: Adds 3 plants, and 3 zombies from PvZ into Minecraft
body: Implements 6 new entities from the Game Plants Vs. Zombies. the peashooter, sunflower, and walnut. Aswell as the normal, cone and bucket head zombie. It also adds the structure of crazy daves house. Please don't take this mod seriously, it's just a silly rather unbalanced mini game.
